genres.label: Government & State
genres.blurb: State actors secretly acting against their own people or hiding operations.

genres.blurb: Intelligence agencies, covert programs, surveillance and psyops.

genres.label: Alternative History
genres.blurb: Claims that the accepted history of an event, person or era is fabricated.

genres.label: Science & Technology
genres.blurb: Suppressed inventions, faked science, or hidden technological programs.

genres.blurb: Medicine, pharma, vaccines, disease origins and public-health cover-ups.

genres.blurb: Aliens, UFOs, disclosure and contact cover-ups.

genres.blurb: Secret societies, cults, esoteric and religious plots.

genres.blurb: Banking cabals, market manipulation, currency and economic control.

genres.blurb: Contested deaths, assassinations, faked deaths and disappearances.

genres.label: Ethnic & Religious Scapegoating
genres.blurb: Theories that scapegoat an ethnic or religious group (catalogued to document harm, not endorse).

genres.label: Media & Surveillance
genres.blurb: Mind control, media manipulation, mass surveillance and social engineering.

truth_scale.label: Debunked
truth_scale.note: Contradicted by overwhelming evidence; physically or logically impossible.

truth_scale.label: Fringe
truth_scale.note: No credible supporting evidence; relies on speculation or misread data.

truth_scale.label: Contested
truth_scale.note: Genuine unanswered questions or unfalsifiable claims; mainstream rejects but a real debate exists.

truth_scale.label: Plausible
truth_scale.note: Substantial circumstantial evidence; partially supported by the record.

truth_scale.label: Substantiated
truth_scale.note: Largely borne out by documents, testimony or later admissions.

truth_scale.label: Confirmed
truth_scale.note: Documented historical fact — a real conspiracy, proven in court, by declassification or admission.

impact_scale.0: Trivial — even if true, changes almost nothing.
impact_scale.25: Local/limited — affects a specific group, event, or industry.
impact_scale.50: National/major — would rewrite a country's politics or a field of science.
impact_scale.75: Global — would upend geopolitics, economics, or shared reality.
impact_scale.100: Civilization-defining — the world is fundamentally not what we think it is.

theories.name: Watergate
theories.summary: The Nixon administration secretly directed a burglary of the Democratic National Committee and then conspired to obstruct the investigation.
evidence_for: Court convictions of 48 officials
The Nixon White House tapes
Nixon's resignation in 1974

evidence_for.text: CIA officer E. Howard Hunt, who ran the agency's espionage operation against Barry Goldwater's 1964 presidential campaign on Lyndon Johnson's behalf, went on to lead the White House 'Plumbers' unit in 1972 -- the group whose break-in at the DNC's Watergate offices triggered the Watergate scandal.

evidence_against: None — it is proven fact

sources.title: The CIA Has Spied on Presidential Candidates Before
Records of the Watergate Special Prosecution Force
United States v. Nixon (1974)
The Nixon Tapes: The Tapes - National Security Archive

theories.name: Project MKUltra
theories.summary: The CIA ran covert human experiments on mind control using LSD, hypnosis and torture, often on non-consenting subjects.
evidence_for: 1975 Church Committee findings
Declassified documents surviving Helms's 1973 destruction order
1977 Senate hearings and victim testimony

If humans can be controlled through their stimuli or through chemicals, perhaps the government will soon not require a major police state like usual dystopian visions. With the rise of digital media and heavily processed foods, perhaps much of.

evidence_for.text: NPR's investigative history, drawing on declassified CIA records that survived a 1973 order to destroy the MKULTRA files, documents the agency's mind-control program -- including non-consensual LSD dosing of citizens and the role of chief chemist Sidney Gottlieb, the 'Poisoner in Chief' -- which was first exposed publicly via a 1975 Rockefeller Commission finding and the 1977 Church Committee hearings.

evidence_against: Full scope unknowable because most files were destroyed

evidence_against.text: The CIA destroyed most MKULTRA records in 1973, so the full scope of the ~150 subprojects and number of victims is permanently incomplete despite the surviving documentation.

sources.title: The CIA's Secret Quest For Mind Control: Torture, LSD And A 'Poisoner In Chief'

theories.name: Tuskegee Syphilis Study
theories.summary: The US Public Health Service deliberately left 399 Black men with syphilis untreated for 40 years to study the disease, lying to them about their care.
evidence_for: Government's own records
1972 exposé and subsequent federal admission
1997 presidential apology

evidence_for.text: The U.S. Public Health Service enrolled 622 Black sharecroppers in Macon County, Alabama in a 40-year study (1932-1972) without informed consent, and deliberately withheld penicillin treatment after it became the standard cure for syphilis in the 1940s -- confirmed by the CDC's own historical account and the 1997 presidential apology.

evidence_against: None — proven fact

evidence_against.text: None -- documented historical fact, acknowledged and formally apologized for by the U.S. government in 1997.

sources.title: Tuskegee syphilis experiment

theories.name: COINTELPRO
theories.summary: The FBI ran a covert program to surveil, infiltrate, discredit and disrupt domestic political groups, including civil-rights and anti-war activists.
evidence_for: Files stolen in the 1971 Media, PA FBI break-in
Church Committee documentation
Released memos targeting MLK

evidence_for.text: FBI records confirm COINTELPRO (1956-1971) ran covert surveillance, infiltration, and disruption operations against civil-rights, anti-war, and Black Power organizations, first exposed by the 1971 Media, PA FBI office break-in and subsequently detailed in the 1975-76 Church Committee investigation.

evidence_against: None — proven fact

evidence_against.text: None -- documented historical fact, confirmed by the FBI's own released files and congressional findings.

sources.title: COINTELPRO

theories.name: Gulf of Tonkin Incident
theories.summary: A second North Vietnamese attack that was used to justify escalating the Vietnam War never actually happened.
evidence_for: Declassified NSA report (2005) concluding the Aug 4 attack did not occur
McNamara's later admissions
Signals-intelligence reanalysis
evidence_against: Some initial contacts on Aug 2 were real; degree of deliberate deception is debated

sources.title: The Gulf of Tonkin Mystery, 2-4 August 1964 (NSA declassified study)
The Truth About Tonkin - Naval History Magazine
Gulf of Tonkin incident - Wikipedia

theories.name: Operation Northwoods
theories.summary: US military leaders drafted (but never executed) a plan to stage fake terrorist attacks on Americans to justify war with Cuba.
evidence_for: Declassified 1962 Joint Chiefs memorandum (released 1997)
Signed by Chairman Lyman Lemnitzer

evidence_for.text: The National Security Archive published the full declassified 1962 Operation Northwoods memorandum, in which the Joint Chiefs of Staff proposed false-flag terrorist attacks on U.S. citizens and military assets to be blamed on Cuba as a pretext for invasion; the plan was rejected by the Kennedy administration but the document is authenticated.

evidence_against: The plan was rejected by JFK and never carried out

evidence_against.text: The plan was never approved or executed -- it documents a proposal, not a carried-out operation.

sources.title: Operation Northwoods memorandum (declassified)
U.S. Military Wanted to Provoke War With Cuba

theories.name: Iran–Contra Affair
theories.summary: The Reagan administration secretly sold arms to Iran and used the proceeds to illegally fund Contra rebels in Nicaragua.
evidence_for: Tower Commission and congressional investigations
Multiple convictions
Documentary and testimonial record

evidence_for.text: The congressional Iran-Contra committees' 1987 report detailed 'The Enterprise,' the CIA-linked private network run by Oliver North and Richard Secord that secretly sold arms to Iran and diverted the proceeds to fund Nicaraguan Contra rebels in violation of the Boland Amendment.

evidence_against: None — proven fact

evidence_against.text: None -- documented via the official congressional Iran-Contra report and subsequent criminal convictions (several later pardoned).

sources.title: The Iran-Contra Report; What 'the Enterprise' Was
Final Report of the Independent Counsel for Iran/Contra Matters (Walsh Report, 1993)
National Archives: Records of the Iran-Contra Investigation
Understanding the Iran-Contra Affairs (Brown University)

theories.name: NSA Mass Surveillance (PRISM)
theories.summary: The NSA secretly collected bulk phone and internet data on millions of ordinary people, at home and abroad, with corporate cooperation.
evidence_for: Snowden's leaked NSA documents (2013)
Official confirmation and legal reforms (USA Freedom Act)
Court rulings finding programs unlawful
Declassified documentation and whistleblower testimony confirm systematic government surveillance of all electronic communications.

evidence_for.text: Documents leaked by Edward Snowden and published by Der Spiegel and the Guardian showed the NSA's surveillance reached the EU, the UN, and allied governments, and that the NSA and GCHQ shared raw intelligence -- including on Americans -- in arrangements designed to route around each country's own domestic-surveillance restrictions.

evidence_against: Agencies dispute the characterization of 'mass' collection

evidence_against.text: None -- confirmed by leaked NSA/GCHQ documents and subsequent government acknowledgment of the programs' existence.

sources.title: NSA 'offers intelligence to British counterparts to skirt UK law'
How America Spies on Europe and the UN

theories.name: Big Tobacco Cover-up
theories.summary: Cigarette makers knew for decades that smoking causes cancer and is addictive, and conspired to hide it and manufacture doubt.
evidence_for: Internal industry documents released in litigation
1998 Master Settlement Agreement
2006 federal RICO ruling against the companies
evidence_against: None — proven in court

sources.title: Civil Division - Litigation Against Tobacco Companies (DOJ)
United States v. Philip Morris - Wikipedia
Everything You Ever Wanted to Know about U.S. v. Philip Morris

theories.name: Oil Industry Climate Denial
theories.summary: Fossil-fuel companies understood the science of climate change decades ago and funded campaigns to deny it and delay action.
evidence_for: Exxon's own 1970s–80s internal research
Investigative reporting (2015) and academic analysis
Documented funding of denial groups
evidence_against: Debate over intent vs. ordinary corporate lobbying

sources.title: Exxon's Own Research Confirmed Fossil Fuels' Role in Global Warming Decades Ago
Exxon's Oil Industry Peers Knew About Climate Dangers in the 1970s, Too
Harvard-led analysis finds ExxonMobil internal research accurately predicted climate change

theories.name: Operation Mockingbird
theories.summary: The CIA cultivated journalists and news organizations to influence media coverage during the Cold War.
evidence_for: Church Committee findings on CIA-media relationships
Carl Bernstein's 1977 reporting
Declassified acknowledgment of paid assets

evidence_for.text: The New York Times reported that the CIA, in an episode it referred to internally as 'Project Mockingbird,' wiretapped the phones of Washington journalists Robert Allen and Paul Scott from 1963 and set up physical surveillance posts to track their contacts -- a domestic press-surveillance operation later examined by Congress -- corroborating the broader Church Committee and Carl Bernstein findings on CIA-press ties that underpin the wider 'Operation Mockingbird' allegations.

evidence_against: The specific named program's scale is disputed; some claims are exaggerated

evidence_against.text: The narrowly-documented 1963 'Project Mockingbird' wiretapping episode is sometimes conflated with the broader alleged Cold War program of CIA media assets; the full extent of the latter beyond Bernstein's 1977 Rolling Stone reporting and the Church Committee's findings remains debated by historians.

sources.title: Project Mockingbird (CIA surveillance of journalists)
Church Committee Final Report, Book I: Foreign and Military Intelligence (1976)
Carl Bernstein, "The CIA and the Media" - Rolling Stone, Oct 20 1977
Operation Mockingbird - Wikipedia

theories.name: The Business Plot
theories.summary: A group of wealthy financiers allegedly plotted a coup to overthrow President Franklin Roosevelt and install a fascist-style government.
evidence_for: Marine Gen. Smedley Butler's sworn testimony
A 1934 congressional committee found the allegations credible
evidence_against: No one was prosecuted
Scale and seriousness of the plot are debated

sources.title: Public Statement of Special Committee on Un-American Activities (McCormack-Dickstein Committee, 1934)
Business Plot - Wikipedia

theories.name: CIA & Crack Cocaine
theories.summary: The CIA tolerated or enabled cocaine trafficking that fueled the 1980s crack epidemic to fund Contra rebels.
evidence_for: Gary Webb's 'Dark Alliance' series
A 1998 CIA Inspector General report admitting the agency worked with known traffickers
evidence_against: The direct causal link to the crack epidemic was overstated and disputed
No evidence of deliberate targeting of Black communities

sources.title: CIA Inspector General Report of Investigation, Volume II: The Contra Story (1998)
Dark Alliance - original San Jose Mercury News series (Gary Webb, 1996)

theories.name: The Deep State
theories.summary: An entrenched network of career officials, intelligence and military figures secretly controls government policy regardless of elected leaders.
evidence_for: Documented bureaucratic resistance and unelected influence
Real historical abuses (COINTELPRO, MKUltra) show agencies acting autonomously
evidence_against: No evidence of a unified, coordinated secret cabal
Confuses ordinary institutional inertia with orchestrated control
theories.steelman: If real, this would fit the documented pattern of the Church Committee findings: entrenched intelligence and law-enforcement bureaucracies (CIA, FBI, NSA) ran surveillance and policy programs like COINTELPRO largely independent of, and sometimes concealed from, elected oversight. No comparable evidence has surfaced of a unified, still-active network overriding current elected leadership as a whole.

theories.name: New World Order
theories.summary: A secretive global elite is engineering a single authoritarian world government that will abolish national sovereignty and individual freedom.
evidence_for: Politicians' rhetorical use of the phrase 'new world order'
Existence of transnational bodies (UN, WEF, IMF)
evidence_against: No evidence of a coordinating secret authority
Rival nations and institutions openly compete, contradicting unified control
Predicted takeovers have never materialized

theories.name: The Illuminati
theories.summary: A secret society founded in 1776 secretly survived its ban and has covertly controlled world events for centuries.
evidence_for: The real Bavarian Illuminati did exist (1776–1785)
18th-century writings by Barruel and Robison alleging survival
evidence_against: The historical order was suppressed and disbanded by 1787
No evidence of continuity or modern operation
Claims rely on pattern-seeking in symbols
theories.steelman: If a Bavarian Illuminati successor network survived its 1785 ban in some form, that would fit a documented pattern: Operation Gladio shows a secret cross-national network really did operate embedded in state institutions for decades before its 1990 disclosure, and Operation Snow White shows an organization can plant operatives across dozens of agencies. No comparable evidence -- documents, defector testimony, or discovery -- has surfaced for a centuries-long Illuminati successor, and the claimed scope of continuous world-event control since 1776 is far beyond any bounded operation on record.

theories.name: Masonic World Control
theories.summary: Freemasons form a secret network that manipulates governments, courts and finance behind the scenes.
evidence_for: Freemasonry is genuinely secretive with rituals and oaths
Historical over-representation of members in some elites
evidence_against: Fraternal networking is not covert global control
No evidence of coordinated political direction
Lodges are fragmented and often rival each other
theories.steelman: The claim that Freemasons quietly influence courts and finance echoes the proven pattern of covert organizational networks embedded in institutions, as with Operation Gladio's decades-long stay-behind cells or Operation Snow White's infiltration of over 100 US agencies. Unlike those cases, no adversarial investigation has produced documents or convictions showing coordinated Masonic manipulation of government or markets.

theories.name: Bilderberg Group
theories.summary: An annual private meeting of powerful politicians and business leaders secretly sets global policy.
evidence_for: The meetings are real, elite, and were long held in secret
Attendees are genuinely influential
evidence_against: No binding decisions or policy outputs are produced
Chatham House-style privacy is not the same as governance
Attendee lists are now published
theories.steelman: If informal elite gatherings translated into concrete coordinated policy action hidden from the public, it would echo the kind of hidden, multi-decade transnational coordination confirmed in Operation Gladio's secret NATO stay-behind network. No comparable evidence shows Bilderberg meetings issuing or coordinating actual policy directives beyond informal, off-the-record discussion among attendees.

theories.name: Bohemian Grove
theories.summary: A secretive all-male elite retreat holds occult rituals and where powerful men make secret decisions.
evidence_for: The club and its 'Cremation of Care' ritual are real
Genuinely powerful attendees
evidence_against: The ritual is theatrical, not literally occult
No evidence policy is decided there
It functions as elite socializing
theories.steelman: Elite figures coordinating informally at closed retreats away from press and public accountability matches a documented pattern: the Pentagon's military-analyst program shows officials quietly enlisting influential figures off the record, and oil companies' climate-denial campaigns show elites coordinating messaging in private for decades before exposure. The specific claims of binding occult ritual and formal secret decision-making at Bohemian Grove itself remain undocumented beyond the acknowledged, avowedly theatrical Cremation of Care ceremony.

theories.name: Federal Reserve Cabal
theories.summary: A cabal of private bankers secretly created and controls the Federal Reserve to enslave nations through debt.
evidence_for: The Fed was designed in secret at a 1910 Jekyll Island meeting
It is an unusual public-private hybrid
evidence_against: The Fed is subject to congressional oversight and public audits
Monetary policy is openly debated, not hidden
'Debt slavery' framing misdescribes central banking

theories.name: Rothschild World Banking Control
theories.summary: The Rothschild banking family secretly controls the world's money supply and governments. (Frequently antisemitic; catalogued to document the trope's harm.)
evidence_for: The Rothschilds were genuinely powerful 19th-century financiers
evidence_against: The family's relative financial power collapsed over a century ago
No evidence of coordinated global control
The theory is a recycled antisemitic canard

theories.name: Protocols of the Elders of Zion
theories.summary: A fabricated text purporting to reveal a Jewish plan for world domination. (A proven forgery, catalogued to document its historical harm.)
evidence_for: None credible
evidence_against: Proven a forgery plagiarized from a 1864 satire (Times of London, 1921)
Used as Nazi propaganda
No authentic provenance

theories.name: JFK Assassination Conspiracy
theories.summary: President Kennedy was killed by a conspiracy — involving the CIA, Mafia, or others — rather than by Lee Harvey Oswald alone.
evidence_for: 1979 House Select Committee concluded a 'probable conspiracy' on acoustic grounds
Genuine anomalies and destroyed/withheld records
Oswald's murder before trial
evidence_against: Warren Commission and later panels found Oswald acted alone
The acoustic evidence was later discredited
No credible second shooter has ever been established
theories.steelman: If real, this would fit the documented pattern of state and non-state actors conspiring in the assassination of a sitting head of government, as with the multi-conspirator plot against Lincoln and the CIA's own admitted assassination programs against foreign leaders uncovered by the Church Committee. No comparable direct evidence -- confession, document, or informant testimony -- has surfaced implicating a specific conspiracy in Kennedy's death.

sources.title: HSCA Final Report (1979): probable conspiracy in the assassination of President Kennedy
Warren Commission Report (1964): lone-gunman conclusion
NAS Committee on Ballistic Acoustics (1982): HSCA acoustic evidence unreliable

theories.name: RFK Assassination Conspiracy
theories.summary: Robert F. Kennedy was killed by more shots than Sirhan Sirhan could have fired, implying a second gunman.
evidence_for: Acoustic analysis suggesting more shots than bullets in Sirhan's gun
Reported extra bullet holes
Sirhan's claimed amnesia
evidence_against: Physical and eyewitness evidence places Sirhan as the shooter
Courts have repeatedly rejected the second-gun claim
theories.steelman: If real, a second gunman would fit the precedent of multi-actor assassination conspiracies against American political leaders and the CIA's demonstrated capacity for untraceable killing methods. The disputed acoustic and bullet-count evidence remains contested rather than independently confirmed.

theories.name: MLK Assassination Conspiracy
theories.summary: Martin Luther King Jr. was killed by a broader conspiracy involving government agencies, not James Earl Ray alone.
evidence_for: A 1999 Memphis civil jury found a conspiracy existed
Documented FBI COINTELPRO harassment of King
Ray recanted his confession
evidence_against: A 2000 DOJ investigation found no evidence of conspiracy
Physical evidence ties Ray to the killing
theories.steelman: If real, this would extend the FBI's own documented campaign against King -- surveillance, blackmail attempts, and stated institutional hostility under COINTELPRO -- into direct facilitation of his killing. No document or informant account has confirmed government direction of James Earl Ray specifically.

theories.name: Epstein Was Murdered
theories.summary: Financier Jeffrey Epstein was murdered in jail to prevent him exposing powerful associates, rather than dying by suicide.
evidence_for: Malfunctioning cameras and absent guards
A pathologist hired by the family disputed the suicide finding
His unique knowledge of powerful people
Documented trafficking network and elite contacts
Unexplained wealth and a 2008 sweetheart plea deal
Acosta's reported 'intelligence' remark
evidence_against: The official autopsy ruled suicide
Systemic jail negligence is well documented and sufficient to explain lapses
No direct evidence of murder
theories.steelman: If real, this would fit the documented pattern of intelligence-linked figures being eliminated to protect a powerful patronage network, echoing the undetectable assassination tradecraft the CIA is confirmed to have developed and the protected-network violence uncovered in Operation Gladio. Documented jail-surveillance and protocol failures are suggestive but do not themselves establish homicide.

sources.title: Forensic pathologist Michael Baden: Epstein injuries more consistent with homicidal strangulation
DOJ Inspector General report on the Federal Bureau of Prisons' custody, care of Jeffrey Epstein

theories.name: Marilyn Monroe Was Murdered
theories.summary: Marilyn Monroe was murdered to silence her over affairs with the Kennedys, rather than dying of an overdose.
evidence_for: Alleged links to the Kennedys
Some inconsistencies in the death scene reports
evidence_against: The coroner ruled probable suicide by overdose
No forensic evidence of murder
Relies on speculation
theories.steelman: If real, this would rely on the same kind of undetectable assassination methods the CIA is confirmed to have developed and demonstrated to the Church Committee. Multiple official reviews of the death have found no forensic evidence of foul play.

theories.name: Dag Hammarskjöld's Death
theories.summary: UN Secretary-General Dag Hammarskjöld's 1961 plane crash was an assassination linked to Congo's independence and mining interests.
evidence_for: A 2017 UN-appointed panel found the possibility of external attack credible
Witnesses reported a second aircraft
Withheld intelligence records
evidence_against: Original inquiries found pilot error
No conclusive proof of attack has emerged
theories.steelman: If real, this would fit the documented pattern of Western intelligence services orchestrating fatal action against leaders threatening resource and Cold War interests, as in the CIA-backed removals of Arbenz and Mosaddegh. The UN's own 2015 Othman inquiry found the crash more likely resulted from external attack than accident, though it identified no definitive perpetrator.

theories.name: Las Vegas Shooting Cover-up
theories.summary: The 2017 Las Vegas mass shooting involved multiple shooters or a hidden motive that authorities covered up.
evidence_for: Shifting official timelines
No clear motive was ever established
evidence_against: Forensic evidence supports a single shooter
'Multiple shooter' audio artifacts are echoes
Investigations found no cover-up

theories.name: Government UFO Cover-up
theories.summary: Governments have recovered alien craft or evidence of extraterrestrial contact and hidden it from the public.
evidence_for: Confirmed secret programs (AATIP) studying UAPs
Declassified footage and pilot testimony
Historical secrecy around Roswell
evidence_against: No physical alien evidence has been produced
Most cases resolve to classified human aircraft or sensor artifacts
'Cover-up' of ordinary secret tech is not proof of aliens

theories.name: Roswell Incident
theories.summary: An alien spacecraft crashed near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947 and the military recovered bodies and covered it up.
evidence_for: The Army initially announced recovery of a 'flying disc'
Decades of witness lore
evidence_against: The debris was from Project Mogul, a secret spy balloon program
The Air Force documented the mundane explanation in 1994
No physical alien evidence

theories.name: Area 51 Alien Technology
theories.summary: The secret Area 51 base reverse-engineers recovered alien spacecraft.
evidence_for: Area 51 is a genuine, highly secret facility
Bob Lazar's 1989 claims of working on alien craft
evidence_against: Area 51 is an acknowledged aircraft testing site (U-2, SR-71, stealth)
Lazar's credentials and claims are unverified/discredited
No alien hardware has ever surfaced

theories.name: Ancient Astronauts
theories.summary: Extraterrestrials visited early humans and were mistaken for gods, helping build the pyramids and other monuments.
evidence_for: Some ancient artworks superficially resemble modern craft
evidence_against: Human engineering of these monuments is well documented
The premise often denies known human ingenuity
No physical alien evidence

theories.name: Moon Landing Hoax
theories.summary: The Apollo Moon landings were faked by NASA on a film set during the Cold War.
evidence_for: Cold War motive to beat the USSR
Misread photo 'anomalies' (flag, shadows, no stars)
evidence_against: Retroreflectors left on the Moon are still used today
Hundreds of thousands of workers and independent nations tracked the missions
Returned Moon rocks; photo 'anomalies' are all explained by physics

theories.name: Flat Earth
theories.summary: The Earth is flat and space agencies conspire to hide it behind a global hoax.
evidence_for: Everyday perception of a flat horizon
evidence_against: Millennia of direct measurement, circumnavigation and photography
Physics of gravity and orbits
Requires an impossibly vast, leak-proof global conspiracy

theories.name: NASA Fabricates Space
theories.summary: NASA systematically fakes space imagery and missions, a premise underpinning flat-earth and moon-hoax claims.
evidence_for: Cited misread CGI/photo artifacts
evidence_against: Independent nations and amateurs verify spaceflight
Physical returned samples and hardware
Live-trackable satellites and ISS

theories.name: Reptilian Overlords
theories.summary: Shape-shifting reptilian aliens secretly occupy positions of power and rule humanity.
evidence_for: None credible
evidence_against: Biologically and physically impossible
Rests on misread images and pattern-seeking
Popularized by David Icke without evidence

theories.name: Chemtrails
theories.summary: The condensation trails behind aircraft are secret chemical or biological agents sprayed on the population.
evidence_for: Visible persistent trails
Real (but different) cloud-seeding and geoengineering research exists
evidence_against: Trails are ordinary condensation explained by atmospheric physics
No chemical evidence in air/soil sampling
Atmospheric scientists reject it unanimously

theories.name: HAARP Weather Control
theories.summary: The HAARP research facility is a secret weapon for controlling weather, causing earthquakes, or mind control.
evidence_for: HAARP is a real high-power ionospheric research facility
Historical interest by militaries in weather modification

If the government controls the weather, perhaps they have been using this power to exert some form of control over the population, either creating disasters to send specific groups of people into disarray by targeting their headquarters, or by.
evidence_against: HAARP studies the upper atmosphere and can't affect weather
Energy scales are far too small to cause quakes/storms
Now openly operated by a university

theories.name: Directed-Energy Wildfires
theories.summary: Major wildfires were deliberately started by secret directed-energy weapons or lasers.
evidence_for: Selectively shared photos of intense, localized burns
evidence_against: Fires are explained by drought, wind and ignition sources
No such weapon capability exists
Burn patterns are normal fire behavior

theories.name: Fluoride Mind Control
theories.summary: Adding fluoride to drinking water is a secret plot to pacify or control the population.
evidence_for: Fluoride is deliberately added to water supplies
Debates over dosage and consent are real
evidence_against: Fluoridation levels are set for dental health and are safe
No neurological control effect exists at these levels
Cold War origins of the fear (communist plot framing)

theories.name: Vaccines Cause Autism
theories.summary: Childhood vaccines, or their ingredients, cause autism, and health authorities hide it.
evidence_for: A retracted 1998 Wakefield paper
Coincidental timing of diagnosis and vaccination age
evidence_against: Wakefield's study was fraudulent and retracted; his license was revoked
Dozens of large studies find no link
Scientific consensus is unambiguous

theories.name: Big Pharma Cure Suppression
theories.summary: Pharmaceutical companies suppress cures (e.g., for cancer) to keep selling ongoing treatments.
evidence_for: Real profit motives and documented drug-pricing abuses
Historical industry misconduct (opioids, tobacco-style tactics)
evidence_against: Cancer is many diseases, not one hidden cure
Researchers and firms compete fiercely to publish breakthroughs
A hidden universal cure could not be kept secret

theories.name: COVID-19 Lab Leak
theories.summary: SARS-CoV-2 originated from a laboratory accident in Wuhan rather than natural zoonotic spillover.
evidence_for: Proximity of the Wuhan Institute of Virology and its coronavirus research
Some intelligence assessments favor a lab origin
Early data-sharing was limited
evidence_against: Genetic and epidemiological evidence points to the Huanan market
Most virologists favor natural spillover
No direct evidence of a specific lab accident
theories.steelman: If real, this would fit the documented pattern of secretive government-linked pathogen research going undisclosed for years, as with Unit 731's biological-weapons program and the US Public Health Service's decades-hidden Guatemala experiments. No leaked internal document or defector testimony has directly confirmed an accidental release from the Wuhan Institute of Virology.

sources.title: FBI Director Wray: COVID origins 'most likely' a lab incident in Wuhan
CIA assesses lab leak most plausible source of Covid-19, with low confidence
FBI Director says bureau believes COVID most likely resulted from lab leak
FBI assesses COVID-19 origin 'most likely a potential lab incident' (Dir. Wray, 2023)
CIA assesses lab origin more likely than natural, low confidence (2025)
ODNI Declassified Assessment on COVID-19 Origins (2021): intelligence community divided
Andersen et al., 'The proximal origin of SARS-CoV-2', Nature Medicine (2020)

theories.name: COVID-19 as Engineered Bioweapon
theories.summary: SARS-CoV-2 was deliberately engineered and released as a biological weapon.
evidence_for: Gain-of-function research exists
Cited (disputed) genomic features
evidence_against: The genome shows no hallmarks of deliberate engineering
No evidence of intentional release
Even a lab-leak would be accidental, not a weapon

theories.name: COVID Vaccine Microchips
theories.summary: COVID-19 vaccines secretly contain microchips or nanotech to track or control people.
evidence_for: None credible
evidence_against: No chip fits through a vaccine needle or exists at that scale
Vaccine contents are documented and independently tested
Misattributes a Gates funding remark

theories.name: 5G Spreads COVID
theories.summary: 5G wireless networks cause or spread COVID-19 by weakening immunity or transmitting the virus.
evidence_for: Coincidental timing of 5G rollout and the pandemic
evidence_against: Viruses cannot travel on radio waves
COVID spread in areas with no 5G
Radio frequencies are non-ionizing and harmless at these levels

theories.name: The Great Reset
theories.summary: A global elite is using crises to abolish private property and impose authoritarian technocratic control ('you will own nothing').
evidence_for: The WEF really launched a 'Great Reset' initiative in 2020
Elite policy coordination is real
evidence_against: The initiative is a policy-branding agenda, not a takeover plan
Misquotes a WEF essay
No mechanism to abolish sovereignty exists

theories.name: Climate Lockdowns
theories.summary: Governments will use climate policy (or '15-minute cities') as a pretext to permanently confine and control citizens.
evidence_for: COVID lockdowns showed states can restrict movement
Urban-planning debates are real
evidence_against: 15-minute cities are a planning convenience, not confinement
No policy proposes permanent movement bans
Extrapolates fear from unrelated policy
theories.steelman: If governments planned to use climate policy as a pretext for expanded control over movement, it would follow the documented pattern of manufactured or exploited pretexts such as the Gulf of Tonkin incident and the proposed Operation Northwoods plans. No evidence of any actual climate-lockdown planning exists; this remains speculative extrapolation from a real category of precedent.

theories.name: 9/11 Was an Inside Job
theories.summary: The US government planned or deliberately allowed the September 11 attacks, e.g. via controlled demolition of the towers.
evidence_for: WTC 7's collapse without a plane impact
Cited intelligence warnings beforehand
Historical precedent of false-flag proposals (Northwoods)
evidence_against: Engineering analyses explain the collapses via fire and impact
No physical evidence of explosives
An operation this large could not stay secret

theories.name: Sandy Hook Was Staged
theories.summary: The 2012 Sandy Hook school shooting was staged with 'crisis actors' to justify gun control.
evidence_for: None credible
evidence_against: Death certificates, first responders and grieving families are real
Alex Jones lost defamation suits for spreading it
No evidence of actors

theories.name: QAnon
theories.summary: A cabal of Satan-worshipping, child-trafficking elites secretly runs the world and is being defeated by a hidden ally ('Q').
evidence_for: Real elite crimes (e.g., Epstein) lend surface plausibility
evidence_against: Every dated 'Q' prediction has failed
No evidence of the alleged cabal
Anonymous, unfalsifiable posts

theories.name: Pizzagate
theories.summary: A Washington, DC pizzeria was the front for a child-trafficking ring tied to Democratic politicians.
evidence_for: None credible
evidence_against: Fabricated from misread leaked emails
The restaurant has no basement
A believer's armed raid found nothing; debunked by investigators

theories.name: The Great Replacement
theories.summary: Elites are deliberately engineering demographic change to 'replace' native populations. (Catalogued to document a harmful, violence-linked trope.)
evidence_for: Real demographic shifts from migration and birth rates
Demographic projections show white majorities declining in some Western nations over coming decades
Immigration rates are high in many Western countries, representing real policy choices
evidence_against: Demographic change is not a coordinated plot
No evidence of orchestration
Repackages the antisemitic 'white genocide' canard; linked to terror attacks

theories.name: Finland Does Not Exist
theories.summary: Finland is a fabrication and the area is actually open sea, maintained by an international conspiracy (originated as satire).
evidence_for: None — it began as a deliberate internet joke
evidence_against: Millions of residents, verifiable geography, and travel
Self-evidently satirical origin

theories.name: Paul Is Dead
theories.summary: Beatle Paul McCartney died in 1966 and was replaced by a look-alike, with clues hidden in album art and songs.
evidence_for: Alleged 'clues' on album covers played backwards
Look-alike claims
evidence_against: McCartney is demonstrably alive
'Clues' are pareidolia and coincidence
Bandmates confirm continuity

theories.name: Mandela Effect
theories.summary: Widespread shared false memories are evidence of parallel universes or altered timelines rather than ordinary memory error.
evidence_for: Many people really do share the same false memories
evidence_against: Well-explained by known psychology of memory and suggestion
No physical evidence of timeline changes
Falsifiable claims fail

theories.name: Simulation Hypothesis
theories.summary: Reality is an artificial computer simulation created by an advanced civilization.
evidence_for: Bostrom's statistical argument
Rapid progress in computing and virtual worlds
evidence_against: Currently unfalsifiable and untestable
No physical evidence
A philosophical proposition more than a conspiracy

theories.name: Perfect Mass Secrecy
theories.summary: Governments are capable of keeping enormous, complex operations perfectly secret for decades — the hidden premise many larger theories require.
evidence_for: Some real programs stayed secret for years (Manhattan Project, MKUltra)
evidence_against: Large conspiracies reliably leak (Watergate, Snowden, Pentagon Papers)
Mathematical models show big secrets collapse quickly
Whistleblowers and records repeatedly surface
theories.steelman: This is the load-bearing premise behind several now-proven cases: Operation Gladio stayed hidden for roughly 40 years, the Katyn Massacre for 50, and Operation Paperclip's true scope for decades, confirming governments can and do keep major operations secret for extended periods. This establishes the mechanism is possible, not that any specific unconfirmed operation today is actually one of them.

theories.name: Operation Gladio
theories.summary: A secret NATO 'stay-behind' network, codenamed Gladio, operated in Italy and across Western Europe, ostensibly to resist a Soviet invasion; evidence emerged that Italian and linked cells carried out terrorist bombings attributed to left-wing groups during the 'Years of Lead.' Italian Prime Minister Giulio Andreotti confirmed the network's existence to parliament in 1990. The extent to which the network directed specific atrocities remains debated, but the covert infrastructure itself is fully documented.
evidence_for: Andreotti's 1990 parliamentary disclosure confirmed the Italian Gladio network and triggered similar investigations across 15+ European countries
Belgian, Swiss, and Italian parliamentary inquiries all documented stay-behind networks and their arms caches
Italian investigators linked Gladio-connected figures to the 1980 Bologna train station bombing (85 dead)
Declassified NATO and CIA documents confirm funding and coordination of the networks
evidence_against: NATO denies that a 'strategy of tension' involving civilian attacks was official policy
The direct link between the central Gladio program and specific terrorist acts is contested; some attacks may have been genuine far-left operations
No single document conclusively shows NATO headquarters ordered domestic bombings

sources.title: Operation Gladio - Wikipedia
The Puzzling Story of NATO's Secret Armies During the Cold War
The Italian 'Stay-Behind' network - The origins of operation 'Gladio'

theories.name: Pentagon Papers
aliases: History of U.S. Decision-Making in Vietnam
theories.summary: A top-secret Defense Department study commissioned by Robert McNamara revealed that the US government had systematically deceived Congress and the public about the Vietnam War's scope, origins, and prospects. Analyst Daniel Ellsberg leaked the 7,000-page document to the New York Times and Washington Post in 1971. The Supreme Court ruled the government could not suppress publication, and the papers became public record.
evidence_for: The documents themselves are public record, published in full
The Supreme Court ruled in New York Times Co. v. United States (1971) that publication was lawful
Daniel Ellsberg's confirmed leak, subsequent trial, and eventual vindication
The papers showed four successive administrations knowingly escalated a war they believed unwinnable
evidence_against: None — proven historical fact

sources.title: Pentagon Papers | National Archives
New York Times Co. v. United States, 403 U.S. 713 (1971)
After 40 Years, Pentagon Papers Declassified In Full

theories.name: Bay of Pigs Invasion
theories.summary: The CIA covertly trained and funded a 1,400-man Cuban exile force to invade Cuba and overthrow Fidel Castro in April 1961. The operation was a catastrophic failure; the brigade was captured and the US government's role — hidden from Congress and the public beforehand — was publicly acknowledged by President Kennedy shortly afterward.
evidence_for: Kennedy publicly admitted US government responsibility after the invasion's failure
Fully documented in the CIA's own 1961 Inspector General survey (declassified 1998)
Congressional testimony and declassified State Department cables confirm planning and funding
Brigade 2506 veterans and their training at CIA camps in Guatemala are on record

evidence_for.text: The CIA organized, funded, trained, and directed the April 1961 invasion of Cuba by Cuban exile paramilitary forces at the Bay of Pigs; the agency's own internal history of the operation was later declassified confirming its planning and command role.

evidence_against: None — proven historical fact

evidence_against.text: None -- documented historical fact, acknowledged by the U.S. government.

sources.title: Bay of Pigs Invasion

theories.name: Operation Paperclip
theories.summary: After World War II, the US government secretly recruited over 1,600 former Nazi scientists, engineers, and technical specialists, sanitizing their records to conceal war crimes and Nazi party membership to circumvent President Truman's prohibition on employing committed Nazis. Recruits included Wernher von Braun and others who became central to the US space and missile programs.
evidence_for: Fully documented in declassified US government records, FBI files, and State Department cables
NASA's own history acknowledges Wernher von Braun's SS membership and his path through the program
Annie Jacobsen's 2014 book and prior scholarly works draw directly on declassified archives
Participants and their altered dossiers are on record at the National Archives

evidence_for.text: Under Operation Paperclip the U.S. government secretly recruited more than 1,600 German scientists and engineers after WWII -- including former Nazi Party members and some implicated in war crimes -- and sanitized their records for immigration, a program confirmed through declassified National Archives records.

evidence_against: None — proven historical fact

evidence_against.text: None -- documented historical fact, acknowledged by the U.S. government.

sources.title: Operation Paperclip

theories.name: Operation Midnight Climax
theories.summary: A CIA sub-project of MKUltra, Operation Midnight Climax established safe houses in San Francisco and New York where agency operatives dosed unsuspecting men — including civilians and criminals — with LSD via prostitutes, then observed reactions through one-way mirrors. The program ran from roughly 1954 to 1965 and was confirmed by surviving documents found in CIA archives in 1977 after Director Helms had most files destroyed in 1973.
evidence_for: Surviving CIA documents discovered in 1977 at the Retired Records Center explicitly describe the operation
Church Committee testimony (1975) and subsequent 1977 Senate hearings with CIA Director Stansfield Turner confirmed the program
Operative George White's diaries corroborate the safe-house operations
CIA Director Richard Helms admitted to the destruction of most MKUltra files in 1973

evidence_for.text: NPR's history of MKULTRA documents 'Operation Midnight Climax,' the CIA's clandestine safe houses in San Francisco and New York where sex workers on the agency's payroll lured unwitting men, who were then dosed with LSD and observed by agents through one-way mirrors.

evidence_against: None — proven fact; the CIA publicly admitted the program

evidence_against.text: None -- documented via declassified CIA records and the 1975 Church/Rockefeller Commission findings.

sources.title: The CIA's Secret Quest For Mind Control

theories.name: Operation Snow White
theories.summary: The Church of Scientology conducted the largest documented infiltration of the US government in history, planting operatives in more than 100 government agencies — including the IRS, FBI, and DEA — to steal and destroy documents critical of the organization. The operation was uncovered by FBI raids in 1977 and resulted in convictions of eleven Scientology officials, including founder L. Ron Hubbard's wife Mary Sue Hubbard.
evidence_for: FBI raids in August 1977 seized over 48,000 pages of documents proving the infiltration program
Eleven Scientology officials, including Mary Sue Hubbard, were convicted on multiple counts in 1979
Documented infiltration of at least 136 government and private organizations across multiple countries
Court records detail specific theft and planting of false information in agency files

evidence_for.text: Operation Snow White involved Church of Scientology members infiltrating and stealing documents from 136 government agencies, foreign embassies, and consulates in over 30 countries using as many as 5,000 covert agents; it was uncovered by an FBI raid and led to criminal convictions of 11 senior Church officials, including Mary Sue Hubbard.

evidence_against: None — proven by court convictions and documentary record

evidence_against.text: None -- documented via FBI raid records and the resulting 1980 federal convictions.

sources.title: Operation Snow White

theories.name: COINTELPRO: Black Panther Targeting
theories.summary: The FBI ran a targeted campaign against the Black Panther Party as part of COINTELPRO, labeling them 'the greatest threat to the internal security of the country.' The campaign involved infiltration, forged letters designed to provoke lethal gang warfare, and collaboration with local police — including advance intelligence sharing that facilitated the December 1969 killing of Chicago Black Panther leader Fred Hampton.
evidence_for: COINTELPRO documents seized in the 1971 Media, Pennsylvania FBI break-in reveal explicit orders targeting the BPP
Church Committee documentation confirmed the forged letter program and agent-provocateur operations
FBI informant William O'Neal's floor plan of Hampton's apartment was provided to Chicago police before the raid
A 1982 civil suit found the government liable for Hampton's death and awarded damages

evidence_for.text: Declassified FBI files show the Bureau fabricated and distributed a 'Black Panther Coloring Book' as black propaganda -- falsely presenting it as the Panthers' own material -- specifically to discredit the party in the eyes of the public as part of COINTELPRO's targeting of the group.

evidence_against: None — the program's existence and specific tactics are proven fact

evidence_against.text: None -- documented in the FBI's own released COINTELPRO files.

sources.title: Coloring The Black Panthers

theories.name: Church Committee Revelations
aliases: Select Committee to Study Governmental Operations
theories.summary: The 1975–1976 Senate Select Committee chaired by Frank Church exposed systemic domestic surveillance abuses by the CIA, FBI, NSA, and IRS, including assassination plots against foreign leaders, COINTELPRO, MKUltra, and mass interception of mail and communications. The hearings produced 14 volumes of findings and led directly to intelligence oversight reforms including the creation of permanent Senate and House intelligence committees and the FISA court.
evidence_for: The committee's 14-volume final report is public congressional record
CIA Director William Colby cooperated and provided documentation of programs including assassination plots
Led directly to the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (1978) and intelligence oversight committees
Confirmed the reality of programs previously denied by agencies, including MKUltra and COINTELPRO

evidence_for.text: The Church Committee's 1975-76 Senate investigation exposed CIA domestic-surveillance programs -- Operation CHAOS, Project MERRIMAC, and Project RESISTANCE -- which compiled files on anti-war activists, Black activist groups, and college campuses, and led to the creation of permanent congressional intelligence oversight.

evidence_against: None — proven congressional fact

evidence_against.text: None -- documented in the Committee's own published findings.

sources.title: 8 times the CIA used American spies to spy on Americans

theories.name: Pearl Harbor Advance Knowledge
theories.summary: President Roosevelt and senior US officials allegedly had specific advance intelligence warning of the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor and deliberately withheld it from commanders to draw the US into World War II. The theory persists despite multiple official investigations concluding that intelligence failures — not deliberate suppression — explained why the attack came as a surprise.
evidence_for: Decoded Japanese diplomatic cables (MAGIC intercepts) were available to senior officials before the attack
The 1940 McCollum memo proposed eight provocations to bring Japan into conflict with the US
US naval and military intelligence had tracked Japanese fleet movements indicating an operation in progress
Some decoded messages were not relayed to Pearl Harbor commanders in a timely fashion
evidence_against: The Japanese strike force maintained strict radio silence; its precise destination was not known from intercepts
Multiple official reviews — Roberts Commission (1942), Hewitt Inquiry (1945), Joint Congressional Investigation (1946) — found intelligence failures, not deliberate suppression
No document has emerged showing FDR or senior officials knew Pearl Harbor specifically would be attacked
The consensus of historians is that inter-agency coordination failures, not a conspiracy, explain the surprise

theories.name: Waco Siege Cover-up
theories.summary: Theories allege that the FBI and ATF used illegal and disproportionate force during the 1993 Waco siege of the Branch Davidian compound, then suppressed evidence of pyrotechnic tear gas use and possible government responsibility for the fire that killed 76 people. Some elements of the cover-up narrative have been partially borne out; others have been investigated and rejected.
evidence_for: The FBI initially denied using pyrotechnic tear gas rounds; this was confirmed in 1999 after documents emerged
A 1999 independent investigation by former Senator John Danforth found evidence of earlier government denials
Disputed infrared footage was cited by some analysts as evidence of agents firing into the compound
Critics noted the conflict between BATF's tactical actions and standard law enforcement procedure
evidence_against: Special Counsel Danforth's 2000 final report found no evidence that federal agents started the fire
Forensic and survivor evidence indicates the main fire was set by Davidians inside the compound
The pyrotechnic rounds were fired away from the main structure and are not linked to the fatal fire
Most specific cover-up allegations have been put to independent review and rejected
theories.steelman: The federal government's own 1999 Danforth investigation confirmed FBI use of pyrotechnic tear gas rounds after years of denial, fitting the documented pattern of official minimization following lethal state use of force seen in the MOVE bombing. Claims that agents deliberately started the fatal fire were not substantiated by that same investigation.

theories.name: Oklahoma City Bombing Second Bomb
theories.summary: Claims that one or more additional explosive devices were planted inside the Murrah Federal Building on April 19, 1995, and that unidentified additional conspirators beyond Timothy McVeigh and Terry Nichols were involved — possibly including foreign intelligence or government agents. Initial news reports of a second device and a composite sketch of 'John Doe No. 2' fueled speculation that was never fully resolved publicly.
evidence_for: Early news reports cited ATF and law enforcement officials referring to a second device found in the building
Some seismologists initially noted two seismic signals, cited as evidence of two separate blasts
The FBI's 'John Doe No. 2' composite drawing was widely distributed before being quietly abandoned
McVeigh's claim that his operation had Middle Eastern connections was never fully investigated publicly
evidence_against: USGS seismologists subsequently explained the double seismic signal as a surface wave reflection, not a second blast
Structural engineers and explosives experts confirmed the damage pattern was consistent with one large ANFO truck bomb
The FBI concluded that John Doe No. 2 was a case of mistaken witness identification and there was no additional conspirator
The initial 'second device' reports were erroneous based on misidentified unexploded ordnance belonging to McVeigh's vehicle
theories.steelman: The Lincoln assassination shows that an official narrative naming a small number of actors can, in rare confirmed cases, understate the true number of co-conspirators later established by investigation. No forensic or testimonial evidence has substantiated additional devices or conspirators beyond McVeigh and Nichols despite extensive review.

theories.name: TWA Flight 800 Missile Theory
theories.summary: TWA Flight 800, which exploded off Long Island in July 1996 killing all 230 aboard, was allegedly shot down by a US Navy missile, with the government covering up the true cause. The four-year NTSB investigation concluded that an explosion in the center fuel tank caused by a mechanical fault was responsible.
evidence_for: More than 100 witnesses reported seeing a streak of light ascending toward the aircraft before the explosion
A 2013 documentary by former NTSB investigators claimed new evidence supported an external explosion
Some radar returns were interpreted by critics as a projectile trajectory
The CIA produced an animated explanation of the ascending streak that some critics found implausible
evidence_against: The 4-year NTSB investigation, the most extensive in aviation history at that point, conclusively identified a center wing fuel tank explosion caused by electrical arcing
The CIA's analysis showed the 'ascending streak' was the burning aircraft climbing after the nose section separated — consistent with witness physics
No military exercise in the vicinity involved live weapons; Navy ships in the area are accounted for
Physical debris reconstruction and chemical analysis found no evidence of a missile strike

theories.name: Jonestown MKUltra Connection
theories.summary: The 1978 Jonestown mass murder-suicide, in which over 900 members of Jim Jones's Peoples Temple died in Guyana, is alleged by some to have been a CIA-orchestrated mind-control experiment continuing MKUltra, rather than a genuine religious-cult atrocity. The theory draws on Jones's documented intelligence contacts and the presence of a CIA officer among the victims.
evidence_for: Jim Jones had documented contacts with US intelligence figures and his organization was monitored by the CIA
A CIA officer (Richard Dwyer) was present at the Jonestown compound on the day of the massacre
Congressman Leo Ryan, who was killed investigating the commune, had been active in CIA oversight
The sheer scale of apparent coercion raises questions about ordinary cult dynamics
evidence_against: No documentary evidence connects MKUltra or any CIA program to Jonestown's operations
Extensive survivor testimony, medical records, and FBI investigation describe a genuine coercive cult under Jones's personal control
Dwyer's presence is explained by his diplomatic role in Guyana, not a covert operation
Forensic evidence is consistent with the documented murder-suicide scenario
theories.steelman: MKUltra's confirmed subprojects on behavioral control, combined with the CIA's 1973 destruction of most MKUltra records, mean the absence of a documented paper trail is weaker evidence than it would otherwise be. No positive evidence -- documents, testimony, or funding records -- has surfaced tying Jim Jones's Peoples Temple to any CIA program.

theories.name: FEMA Concentration Camps
theories.summary: FEMA has secretly constructed or designated a network of concentration camps to intern American citizens en masse during a declaration of martial law, national emergency, or political crackdown. The theory surged in popularity during the Obama administration and is often linked to the real but distinct 1984 'Rex 84' civil-disorder contingency plan.
evidence_for: Real emergency contingency plans (Rex 84, 1984) outlined detention procedures for up to 400,000 undocumented immigrants in a national emergency
Historical precedent of Japanese American internment (1942) shows mass detention is not unprecedented
FEMA does maintain a National Emergency Resource Register and has authority over some large facilities
Photographs of ordinary facilities (empty warehouses, fairgrounds) have been widely circulated as 'evidence'
evidence_against: Every specific 'FEMA camp' identified has been investigated and found to be an ordinary facility — stadiums, empty lots, rail yards
Rex 84 was a civil-disorder scenario involving undocumented immigrants, not a plan to intern American citizens
Journalists, politicians, and activists have visited claimed sites and documented them as mundane
No credible whistleblower or document has substantiated the network of camps

theories.name: Agenda 21 Control Plot
theories.summary: The United Nations' 1992 Agenda 21 sustainable development program is claimed to be a covert blueprint for dismantling private property rights, abolishing national sovereignty, confining rural populations to monitored urban zones, and achieving a drastic reduction in world population — all under a one-world government managed by the UN.
evidence_for: Agenda 21 is a real UN document adopted at the 1992 Rio Earth Summit by 178 governments
It addresses land use, consumption patterns, and population, which touch on property and lifestyle
Language about 'changing individual behavior' and global governance coordination has been cited by critics
Subsequent Agenda 2030 goals explicitly target economic restructuring
evidence_against: Agenda 21 is entirely non-binding; it has no enforcement mechanism and no legal authority over member states
The document's actual text focuses on voluntary sustainability goals and poverty reduction, not coercive control
Hundreds of municipalities adopted Agenda 21 plans openly, with no accompanying loss of autonomy
Detailed reading of the text contradicts virtually every specific claim made by conspiracy proponents

theories.name: Project Blue Beam
theories.summary: Project Blue Beam, first described by Canadian journalist Serge Monast in 1994, alleges that NASA and the UN plan to stage a fake extraterrestrial invasion or Second Coming using holographic projections in the sky and mind-control technologies transmitted via satellite, in order to manufacture public acceptance of a totalitarian one-world government and religion.
evidence_for: Holographic projection technology has advanced and large-scale aerial projections are theoretically possible in limited forms
Governments and militaries have used psychological operations and staged events historically
Monast cited alleged NASA documents, though none have been independently verified
evidence_against: No credible evidence the project exists; no leaked document, whistleblower, or physical proof has emerged
The technology required to project globally visible holograms across open sky does not exist and is physically implausible at scale
Monast provided no verifiable sources; his claims have been traced to no documentary origin
Monast died in 1996; subsequent 'updates' are unverifiable internet embellishments

theories.name: Georgia Guidestones
theories.summary: A granite monument erected in Elbert County, Georgia, in 1980 by an anonymous patron using the pseudonym 'R.C. Christian' bore inscriptions in eight languages outlining goals including maintaining world population under 500 million. Conspiracy theorists interpreted the monument as a declaration of a Satanic New World Order plan for genocidal population reduction; others view it as an eccentric conservationist's statement. The stones were destroyed by explosion in July 2022.
evidence_for: The call to 'maintain humanity under 500,000,000' is far below current population and alarmed many readers
The patron's identity was never publicly confirmed, lending an air of institutional secrecy
Inscriptions about a 'world court' and a single new language align with New World Order rhetoric
The stones attracted vandalism and were targeted by political activists citing their content
evidence_against: The patron was later identified as Elberton businessman Herbert Hinie Kersten, a private individual with no organizational backing
The inscriptions are aspirational conservation and governance guidelines, not orders or a revealed plan
No organization has claimed authorship or acted on the 'guidelines' in any documented way
The monument's destruction in 2022 by unknown assailants produced no conspiracy revelations

theories.name: Denver International Airport Conspiracy
theories.summary: Denver's airport, which opened in 1995 amid cost overruns and delays, is claimed to be a secret NWO headquarters featuring murals depicting a genocidal world takeover, underground bunkers for the global elite, and Masonic and occult symbols throughout the terminal. The airport's dedication capstone carries a Masonic inscription, and grotesque gargoyle statues add to the atmosphere.
evidence_for: The murals by Leo Tanguma depict vivid apocalyptic imagery — a uniformed figure with a sword, dead children, burning cities — which are genuinely unsettling and controversial
A Masonic time-capsule capstone is present at the airport with a reference to the 'New World Airport Commission'
The airport's construction was significantly over budget and delayed, feeding suspicion about hidden purposes
Underground tunnels (the automated baggage system) are extensive and were partly unused for years

Major government-owned facilities like airports experience massive foot traffic; some or all major airports may contain secret installations designed to drain and store the physical and spiritual energy of passing travelers, explaining the otherworldly lethargy many experience.
evidence_against: Artist Leo Tanguma publicly explained the murals as depicting humanity overcoming war, genocide, and environmental destruction — a peace narrative, not a blueprint
The 'New World Airport Commission' was a temporary promotional body for the airport opening, not a global cabal
The 'underground tunnels' are the airport's documented automated baggage system
The airport has leaned into the conspiracies with humor, posting self-referential jokey signage about being a secret base

theories.name: Skull and Bones
theories.summary: Yale University's Skull and Bones secret society, founded in 1832, is claimed to be the recruiting arm of an elite cabal that secretly controls US intelligence, politics, and banking. Members including George H.W. Bush, George W. Bush, John Kerry, and numerous CIA directors are cited as evidence of coordinated power.
evidence_for: Many members have reached the highest levels of US government: three presidents, multiple CIA directors, senators, and Supreme Court justices
The society is genuinely secretive, with rituals, oaths, and a 'tomb' headquarters sealed from non-members
Antony Sutton's 1983 research documented extensive member overlap with powerful institutions
Members refer to non-Bonesmen as 'outsiders,' suggesting in-group loyalty
evidence_against: Correlation between elite educational networks and political power is not evidence of covert coordinated control
Membership overlaps with dozens of other elite organizations (Scroll and Key, Wolf's Head, Council on Foreign Relations)
No evidence of coordinated policy direction beyond alumni networking and mutual sponsorship
The society's influence, while real as a social network, is qualitatively similar to other elite fraternal organizations
theories.steelman: An elite alumni network quietly favoring its own in intelligence and finance would resemble the real dynamic behind Operation Gladio's multi-decade embedded cells or Operation Snow White's institutional infiltration, and old-boy patronage networks are a documented feature of elite institutions generally. What's missing is any equivalent leak, prosecution, or document trail showing Skull and Bones itself coordinates intelligence or banking policy rather than merely producing alumni who later hold power independently.

theories.name: George Soros Puppet Master
theories.summary: Billionaire philanthropist George Soros secretly orchestrates political upheavals, open-border immigration policies, progressive protest movements, and electoral interference worldwide through a network of NGOs funded by his Open Society Foundations. The theory frequently deploys antisemitic tropes about Jewish financiers controlling governments and has been linked to violent attacks. Catalogued to document a harmful, evidence-free trope.
evidence_for: Soros's Open Society Foundations publicly spend billions funding civil society organizations, media, and political causes
Soros has acknowledged funding democracy-promotion groups in former Soviet states
Some OSF-funded organizations have been involved in voter registration and electoral advocacy
Soros himself has written about his political views and funding priorities
evidence_against: Philanthropic donations to NGOs are legal, publicly disclosed at the organizational level, and not covert control
The 'puppet master' framing directly mirrors classical antisemitic canards about Jewish financiers (Rothschild trope) applied to a living person
Diverse protest movements attributed to Soros have documented organic origins unrelated to OSF funding
The theory was explicitly linked to the 2018 Pittsburgh synagogue shooting and multiple bomb threats against Soros

theories.name: Cultural Marxism Conspiracy
theories.summary: Frankfurt School Marxist intellectuals — many of them Jewish emigrants from Nazi Germany — allegedly devised a deliberate plan to infiltrate Western universities, media, and institutions to destroy traditional culture, family structures, Christianity, and national identity, paving the way for communist or globalist takeover. The theory maps real academic critical theory onto an intentional subversive conspiracy it was never designed to support.
evidence_for: The Frankfurt School intellectuals did explicitly critique bourgeois and capitalist culture
Critical theory did spread through academic humanities and is genuinely influential
Antonio Gramsci wrote about cultural hegemony and the role of intellectuals in social change
Cultural changes in Western societies since the 1960s are real and significant
evidence_against: The term 'Cultural Marxism' was coined by far-right critics, not the academics themselves, and misrepresents their actual work
Academic influence on culture is not a secret conspiracy — the Frankfurt School published openly
The theory closely mirrors pre-existing antisemitic conspiracy narratives about Jewish intellectuals corrupting host cultures ('cultural Bolshevism' in Nazi Germany)
Cultural change in Western societies has multiple documented drivers; attributing it to a small academic school is unfalsifiable reductionism

theories.name: Dzopa Tribe (Dropa Stones)
theories.summary: In the Himalayan mountains, nearly 1,000 graves contain 4-foot tall skeletons with unusually large skulls. Each grave held indecipherable writings and a circular disc estimated at 12,000 years old, made of cobalt and etched with prime numbers.
evidence_for: Ancient disc artifacts made of non-native materials suggest advanced prehistoric technology; prime number inscriptions indicate intelligent design beyond contemporary capabilities.

evidence_against.text: Extensive inquiries found no record of Dropa stones in any museum worldwide and no verifiable existence of persons alleged to have discovered or translated them; the originating book was revealed by its own author to be a hoax and satire.
Photographs of the alleged discs show objects resembling ordinary bi discs—ancient Chinese jade artefacts—not extraterrestrial artefacts with prime-number inscriptions.

sources.title: Dropa stones - Wikipedia
10 Most Not-So-Puzzling Ancient Artifacts #2: The Dropa Stones

theories.name: Lord Pakal's Time Machine
theories.summary: Mayan king Lord Pakal's coffin contains visuals depicting him interacting with complex machinery and describes impossible feats. The body inside was 30-40 years old despite Pakal ruling for 80 years.
evidence_for: Discrepancy between coffin visuals showing advanced machinery and iconography impossible for the time period; biological age mismatch contradicts historical records of his long reign.

evidence_against.text: The 'astronaut' interpretation originates with Erich von Daniken's 1968 Chariots of the Gods. Mainstream Mayanists identify the lid as depicting Pakal's descent into Xibalba (the underworld) - a standard Mayan cosmological scene with no technological elements.

sources.title: K'inich Janaab' Pakal - Wikipedia
Pacal's Rocket - Ancient Aliens Debunked
Pacal's Sarcophagus - Ancient Mayan King Rocket Ship

theories.name: Monsanto
theories.summary: A prominent agricultural corporation accused of numerous immoral acts such as stifling cancer research.
evidence_for: History of corporate malfeasance and suppression of independent health research suggests systematic corruption of regulatory systems to protect profits over public health.

evidence_for.text: Court documents reveal Monsanto paid a chemical industry front group to counter evidence that glyphosate causes cancer, and that the company ghostwrote research published under academics' names.
A 2000 paper that Monsanto had influence over was retracted in 2017 for serious ethical concerns after internal emails showed company employees helped draft it.

sources.title: Monsanto Alleged to Have Suppressed Roundup Cancer-Link Study - Courthouse News
Court Docs: Monsanto Paid Chemical Industry Front Group to Claim Cancer-Causing Weedkiller Safe - EWG
Journal retracts weed killer study backed by Monsanto - Science/AAAS
Cancer, Juries, and Scientific Certainty: The Monsanto Roundup Ruling Explained - Snopes

theories.steelman: If Monsanto/Bayer suppressed evidence of its products' health or agricultural risks for profit, it would fit the documented pattern of Big Tobacco and Merck concealing internal data on product harm to protect revenue. Real regulatory disputes over the underlying science exist, but no equivalent internal-document trove proving deliberate suppression has surfaced for Monsanto specifically.

theories.name: Vimana
theories.summary: Ancient Hindu and Sanskrit texts describe great flying palaces existing above the Himalayan mountains, treated as non-phenomenal rather than mythological.
evidence_for: Detailed technical descriptions in ancient Sanskrit texts, when studied, contain aeronautical engineering concepts suggesting either advanced prehistoric technology or technological diffusion from unknown sources.

evidence_for.text: Multiple ancient Sanskrit texts including the Mahabharata, Ramayana, and Samarangana Sutradhara describe flying craft with detailed specifications including mercury-engine propulsion.

sources.title: Vimana - Wikipedia
Vaimānika Shāstra - Wikipedia

theories.name: North Korea Utopia
theories.summary: North Korea is actually a utopian society hidden from public view, either through North Korea's own media blackout or Western media manipulation.
evidence_for: If all external information about nations can be fabricated by media, the opposite narrative—complete prosperity hidden from the world—becomes theoretically possible under total information control.

evidence_against.text: The utopia narrative originates from North Korean state propaganda; extensive defector testimonies and human rights documentation describe severe repression, famine, and political imprisonment.

sources.title: Five crazy theories that could totally explain North Korea - Washington Post

theories.name: Grand Unified Conspiracy Theory
theories.summary: A collection of alleged connections between corporations, governments, nations, and secret societies.
evidence_for: If corporations have achieved unprecedented scale and power, they could have infiltrated and coordinated across governmental and financial systems, creating a unified power structure hidden beneath surface-level political divisions.
theories.research_note: no Wikipedia article for 'grand unified conspiracy theory' as a named concept; the term is mainly used as a label for works attempting to connect all major conspiracy theories into a single framework

sources.title: A Grand Unified Conspiracy Theory: The Illuminati, Ancient Aliens, and Pop Culture (book) - Amazon

theories.name: Cybersquatting Time Travelers
theories.summary: Time travelers went back to the early internet era to claim domains that would become major companies.
evidence_for: If time travel is possible, optimizing resource acquisition across timelines would be the logical strategy; the improbable early successes of certain tech companies could reflect trial-and-error across alternate timelines.
theories.research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore only.

theories.name: Comic-Con Child Recruitment
theories.summary: Numerous children go missing annually at Comic-Con, with the theory that the event organizers are complicit and paid off.
evidence_for: Large, crowded events with reduced parental supervision and external oversight create environments where systematic abductions could occur undetected if coordinated with event security.

theories.name: Plastic Surgery Runaways
theories.summary: Underground doctors perform plastic surgery on kidnapping victims to make them impossible to find.
evidence_for: If criminal networks require evidence destruction, surgical identity alteration would be technically straightforward; documented existence of underground medical networks suggests the infrastructure already exists for such operations.

theories.name: Lifetide
theories.summary: Humans are artificial, and through introspection, a more authentic self can be achieved.
evidence_for: If human consciousness has engineered origins, true self-realization would require stripping away artificial programming through contemplative practice, leading to abilities and understanding suppressed in baseline humans.

theories.name: Baltic Sea Anomaly
theories.summary: A fishing boat caught an image of what appeared to be an alien spaceship at the bottom of the Baltic Sea.
evidence_for: Sonar imagery shows geometric structure inconsistent with natural geological formations; international media suppression of further investigation suggests governmental knowledge of non-human artifacts on Earth.

evidence_against.text: Samples from the site were identified as granite, gneiss, and sandstone — rock types expected in a glacial basin. The sonar instrument used was described by Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution as 'virtually useless' due to calibration errors.

sources.title: Baltic Sea anomaly - Wikipedia
The Baltic Sea Anomaly: What Was The Mysterious Object Seen 90-Meters Underwater? - IFLScience
Was a UFO Found at the Bottom of the Baltic Sea? - Snopes

theories.name: Planned Extinction (Eco Triage)
theories.summary: Humanity will inevitably go extinct, so certain groups are actively facilitating this extinction.
evidence_for: If human extinction is mathematically inevitable due to entropy and resource depletion, powerful actors might actively accelerate collapse to maximize their own resource extraction before systemic failure.
theories.research_note: Ecological triage as a conservation prioritization concept has Wikipedia coverage. The conspiracy extension (elites actively facilitating human extinction) has no dedicated external coverage; iceberg-chart lore.

sources.title: Ecological triage - Wikipedia

theories.name: Haunted Locations World Map
theories.summary: A supposed map depicting all haunted locations throughout the world.
evidence_for: If geomancy and leyline theory are valid, a comprehensive global mapping of supernatural hotspots would reveal patterns of spiritual energy concentration that governments would suppress to prevent unauthorized spiritual advancement.

theories.name: Artificial Poisonous Snow
theories.summary: A type of snow that does not melt for extended periods and turns black when exposed to fire, likely caused by pollution or artificial means.
